creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Matthew Wener from comment #3)

I just added some placeholder PORTREVISION, the reason we cant reset to 0 just yet is because someone might already have PORTREVISION 6 installed.
When further bumping from 0 to 1, the users having PORTREVISION 6 installed wont get notified to update the package.
